sources.cleaned_content:
iK Multi Pro 2 Sprayer

Brand: IK Sprayer
Price: $58.18 CAD

Images:
- https://www.tocsupplies.ca/cdn/shop/products/iK-MULTI-PRO-2PACKAGING.jpg?v=1642772860&width=1000
- https://www.tocsupplies.ca/cdn/shop/products/iK-PRO-2-TRIGGER-LOCK.jpg?v=1642772860&width=1500
- https://www.tocsupplies.ca/cdn/shop/products/iK-MULTI-PRO-2MAIN.jpg?v=1642772860&width=1500
- https://www.tocsupplies.ca/cdn/shop/products/iK-MULTI-PRO-2-DEMO-3.jpg?v=1642772860&width=1500
- https://www.tocsupplies.ca/cdn/shop/products/iK-MULTI-PRO-2-DEMO.jpg?v=1642772860&width=1500
- https://www.tocsupplies.ca/cdn/shop/products/ik-multi-pro-2-mclaren-720s-demo.jpg?v=1642772860&width=1500

Description:
For over 60 years, the Goizper Group has been designing and manufacturing high quality sprayers for the Automotive, Industrial, Janitorial, and Construction sectors from their state-of-the-art European facilities, developing a reputation as a true leader in the industry.

- Self-Contained with Everything You'll Need to Get Spraying Right Away - Save Money, No Gas or Electric Pressure Washer Needed!
- All iK Sprayers Are Equipped With the Highest Quality FPM, Viton Seals and Washers
- All iK Polypropylene and Polyethylene Tanks are Heavy Duty Injection Molded
- Wider Mouth and Funnel Opening Create An Easy Filling Process and Easy Cleaning Process
- All iK Hoses are Made of Strong PVC with the Perfect Amount of Flexibility
- All iK Sprayers Come with Pressure Relief Safety Valves

FEATURES:
- Translucent tank with level indicator
- Base for greater stability
- Large opening easy filling
- Safety lock
- Safety valve with depressurisation option
- Protective sleeve for valve chamber
- Ability to identify content via coloured caps
- Option of fitting other types of nozzles and accessories
- Easy assembly and taking apart for cleaning and maintenance, tool free

IK MULTI PRO 2 Instruction Manual: https://www.theragcompany.com/content/instruction-manual.pdf

Customer Reviews (Based on 1 review):
S. - Heavy-Duty Sprayer: The iK MULTI 2 Professional Grade Hand Pump Sprayer is hands down one of the best sprayers I've used for detailing and cleaning. Right out of the box, it feels durable and well-built, with a heavy-duty polypropylene/polyethylene tank that can handle acids, alcohols, alkalines, hydrocarbons, and oils without any issues. One of the standout features is the adjustable conical and fan nozzles, which allow for precise or wide spray patterns depending on the job. The pressure release valve at 45 psi is a great safety feature, and the safety lock trigger prevents accidental spraying. The stable base is a much-needed upgrade, preventing it from tipping over, and the large filling mouth makes refilling easy with no mess. I also appreciate the color-coded handle tips along with the storage handle (blue/green) for quick chemical identification - super useful in a busy detailing environment. If you need a professional-grade sprayer for detailing, cleaning, or janitorial work, this is a must-have. Solid construction, smart design, and reliable performance - I highly recommend it! Not recommended for foam.

sources.page_title: IK Multi Pro 2 Sprayer - 50 oz - Detailed Image
sources.cleaned_content:
IK Multi Pro 2 Sprayer - 50 oz

Price: $41.99
Quantity Discount: 2+ units at $38.99 (7% savings)
Available Size: 50 oz - $41.99
Product Code: 81671

Images:
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/IK-Multi-Pro-2-Sprayer-50-oz_2013_1_m_4158.jpg
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/IK-Multi-Pro-2-Sprayer-50-oz_2013_1_lw_2552.jpg
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/IK-Multi-Pro-2-Sprayer-50-oz_2013_1_lw_3236.jpg

Product Information:
- Easily apply your favorite detailing chemical!
- Saves effort and time with less trigger pulls
- Safe for acids and other strong detailing chemicals
- Improves on the already popular IK Multi 1.5 Sprayer

Product Description:
The IK Multi Pro 2 Sprayer will help you easily spray your favorite detailing chemicals! When using a traditional spray bottle, you can quickly become tired when having to pull the trigger over and over. With the IK Multi Pro 2, you will have everything you loved about the IK Multi 1.5 Sprayer, with some newly added features! The Multi Pro 2 features a pump at the top of the bottle, allowing you to pump up the pressure and disperse your favorite detailing chemical with the simple push of the thumb trigger. Hold the trigger and the product within the bottle will be dispersed until the pressure in the bottle has been completely released. This not only saves you the effort of multiple trigger pulls, but can save you valuable detailing time as well. This bottle features a safety valve with depressurization and a protective sleeve for the valve chamber. This protective sleeve works optimally with disinfectants, neutral products, and acids. It is also suitable with solvent-based pesticides, alcohols, and oils, solvents and petroleum by-products. The new trigger lock system helps you avoid any accidental discharges and the non-wobble base saves the unit from accidental tip-overs. The two new color caps fit on the end of the hollow handle, which also acts as a storage area for your fan sprayer and your multi-spray tip. Whichever tip you are not using, toss in the handle to keep safe. Pick up the IK Multi Pro 2 Sprayer and save valuable time when applying your favorite detailing chemical!

Important - Run water through the unit and depressurize before storing. This helps stop premature wear on the seals.

360 vs Standard - The Multi Pro 2 360 features a flexible tube, designed to pull chemical out of the unit when used at any angle. The standard Multi Pro 2 does not feature this flexible tube.

Video: GOING PRO 2: All About the New iK Pro 2 Foam & Multi Sprayers (YouTube ID: R1Jx4gl0A8Q)

Customer Reviews (92% would buy again, based on 12 ratings):

ali i. (11/18/2023, DI Verified Purchase, Would buy again: Yes): I use ONR for pretreatment for washing ceramic coated cars. It is fast, easy, and precise.

Phil C. (10/6/2023, DI Verified Purchase, Would buy again: Yes): Love the sprayer! It's fun to use. It's ergonomic--the handle feels comfortable, and it's powerful! It really puts down a lot of solution fast. It comes with two nozzles. One has a very wide (fan) spray pattern. The other can be adjusted to spray a mist or a jet. Plus, DI has replacement parts which may be needed in the future. A couple of minor drawbacks: you can't lock in the trigger to spray continuously. In other words, you have to keep pressing the button to dispense solution. And opening the chamber is a bit awkward. Nonetheless, it's a great tool.

Stephen S. (6/30/2023, DI Verified Purchase, Would buy again: Yes): I've resisted buying this spray for a couple years due to it's price. I've been getting by with cheap Harbor Freight pump sprayers and they work, just not very well. Last week, I bit the bullet and bought the latest IK pump sprayer. The difference between the IK and the cheapies are night and day. First, it pumps up much faster and easier. Next the spray pattern is WAY better. The IK has made rinseless pre-spray so much faster and more enjoyable. Highly recommend!

iK Multi Pro 2 360

Images:

- https://theragcompany.com/cdn/shop/files/ik-multi-pro-2-360-main-web.jpg?v=1700602123

- https://theragcompany.com/cdn/shop/files/ik-multi-pro-2-360-nissan-240-demo-2.jpg?v=1765478278
- https://theragcompany.com/cdn/shop/files/ik-multi-pro-2-360-nissan-240-demo-4.jpg?v=1765478278

Description:
The IK MULTI Pro 2 360 sprayer is engineered for top-tier performance, offering exceptional ergonomics, ease of use, and enhanced safety. Designed to deliver professional-grade spraying results, it is ideal for a wide range of applications, including construction, cleaning and disinfection, pest and virus control, automotive detailing, industrial maintenance, and HVAC servicing.

Built for maximum durability and chemical resistance, the IK MULTI Pro 2 is especially effective when working with aggressive substances, including highly acidic solutions. Its 360 spray functionality allows for consistent output at any angle - perfect for hard-to-reach areas and precise applications.

Product Features:
- Durable, translucent tank with built-in level indicator
- Ergonomic and innovative design for user comfort
- Wide, stable base for added support and balance
- Large opening for quick and easy filling
- Integrated safety lock for secure operation
- Built-in depressurization safety valve
- Protective sleeve around valve chamber for added durability
- Tool-free disassembly for easy cleaning and maintenance
- Color-coded caps for easy chemical identification
- Convenient nozzle storage inside colored caps
- Multiple spray pattern options to suit different applications

Sprayer Care & Cleaning:
- Always depressurize the sprayer and rinse with clean water after each use.
- Dispose of any remaining chemicals in accordance with local regulations.
- If the nozzle becomes blocked, rinse with water only - do not use metal objects to clear it.
- Remove and clean the handle filter with water if clogged.
- Store indoors in a cool, dry place - avoid freezing or extreme heat (ideal range: 5C to 30C).
- To extend the life of the seals, regularly lubricate moving parts with appropriate grease.

Additional Information:
- Dimensions: 5" Length x 0.75" Width
- Color Options: Red (Double Axe) & Green (Single Axe)
- Country of Origin: Japan

Safety Information:
- Always follow the manufacturer's instructions and recommended dosages on chemical product labels.
- Do not eat, drink, or smoke while preparing or using chemical products to prevent accidental ingestion.
- Never spray toward people, animals, electrical equipment, open flames, or any source of ignition.
- In the event of poisoning, seek medical attention immediately and bring the chemical packaging with you.
- Do not dispose of waste products or residues near water sources, wells, or other environmentally sensitive areas.
- Wear appropriate protective gear such as gloves, goggles, masks, and protective clothing to prevent contact with skin, eyes, or mouth.
- Read and understand the sprayer's user manual before use.
- Do not modify the sprayer.
- Do not obstruct or strike the safety valve.
- Do not use the sprayer if it is damaged, deformed, or altered from its original design.
- Replace any damaged parts with official replacements - do not attempt repairs with makeshift parts.
- Keep out of reach of children.
- Use only with compatible substances.
- Use only original spare parts and accessories. The manufacturer is not responsible for damage caused by third-party components.

Customer Reviews:

Daniel H. (Verified Buyer, 5/5 stars, 4 days ago): Great sprayer. Used with diluted Optimum No Rinse. Nice controllable spray and holds pressure well.

Lee M. (Verified Buyer, 4/5 stars, 8 months ago): Sprayer. Needed a former so bought the wrong item but will find a use for sprayer.

Mark D. (Verified Buyer, 5/5 stars, 1 year ago): Works Very Well. I use this exclusively for rinseless washing. It is perfect!

sources.page_title: IK MULTI Pro 2 | IK Hand Pump Pressure Sprayer Multi Pro 2
sources.cleaned_content:
IK MULTI Pro 2 Handheld Sprayer

Brand: IK Sprayers
Product code: 81671
Selected Type: Handheld Sprayer
Price: 25.45 GBP
Stock: In Stock

Images:
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/16810-700-700/ik-multi-pro-2.png
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/16809-700-700/ik-multi-pro-2.png
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/16811-700-700/ik-multi-pro-2.png
- https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/DynamicImages/16812-700-700/ik-multi-pro-2.png

All Purpose Pump Up Sprayer

The IK MULTI Pro 2 has been refined over the years to offer you one of the best hand held sprayers on the market. Tired of pulling the trigger back and forth, hand cramping up, switch over to a pump up sprayer to get through the job quicker. Wheel cleaning is one of the areas of a car where no matter the quality of the cleaner used, if you don't distribute it evenly over the wheel, areas will be missed. A pump or sprayer gives you much more control over that distribution, a constant even spray allows you to direct the flow to where you need it. Don't waste time or money again on wasted product.

The large funnel top allows for an easy fill and the hand pressure pump or safety value gives you the control on the pressure when in use or storage.

The safety value is set at 2.5 bar, so you can't over pump the unit and damage any sills. For professional workers, the large stable base and large integrate funnel fill can save time in-between use. Choose between two spray nozzle, a cone for more even distribution of product or a fan if straight spraying is required.

What's more the IK Multi Pro 2, Colour-caps for quick identify the internal product and translucent tank ensure you never spray the wrong product.

The Multi Pro is available in 2 larger forms: 8L Multi Pro 12 or 6L Multi Pro 9, all designed for maximum strength and versatility with the most aggressive chemicals, specifically resistant to acids.

Features:
- Valve - Tared at 2.5 bar / 43,5 psi depressurizable with automatic depressurization option
- Nozzles - Adjustable conical nozzle and fan
- Useful capacity - 1.5L
- Total capacity - 1.9L
- Litres/Min @ 2.5 bar - 0,7l/min
- Gross weight - 0.70kg
- Net weight - 0.58kg

How To Use:
- Depressurise and cleaner after each use.
- Dispose of chemicals according to legislation & regulations.
- If the nozzle is blocked clean with water and do not use metal objects.
- If the filter is blocked clean it with water.
- Store the sprayer indoors and avoid temperatures about or below 5-30C.
- Apply grease to moving parts and seals regularly.

Documents:
- IK Sprayer Chemical Table: https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/documents/IK-Sprayer-Chemical-Table.pdf
- IK Sprayer Instruction Booklet: https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/documents/IK-Instruction-Booklets/81671-INS.pdf
- IK Sprayer Catalogue: https://www.theultimatefinish.co.uk/documents/IK-Instruction-Booklets/81671-CAT.pdf

Customer Reviews: No reviews yet.

Description:
The IK MULTI Pro 2 sprayer is well known by its maximum performance in terms of ergonomics, ease of use and safety. It offers a professional spraying solution to achieve optimum results in a wide range of sectors such as construction, cleaning and disinfection, virus, pest and epidemic control, automotive, industry and air conditioning (HVAC).

This sprayer is particularly resistant to acids.
